headline_en: Agent infrastructure, evaluation realism, and compute scarcity dominated the day, with frontier labs emphasizing harness design, capacity, memory, and harder-to-game benchmarks.
headline_zh: 今天的主线是 agent 基础设施、真实场景评测和算力稀缺，前沿实验室与研究社区都在强调 harness、容量、记忆和更难被投机的 benchmark。

items.en: Claude said Claude Fable 5 will be included in all Max and Team Premium plans starting July 20 at 50% of limits. Pro and Team Standard users will keep access through usage credits and receive a one-time $100 credit, reflecting Anthropic’s attempt to stabilize access while it adds capacity.
items.zh: Claude 表示，从 7月20日 开始，Claude Fable 5 将纳入所有 Max 和 Team Premium 计划，额度为 50%。Pro 和 Team Standard 用户仍可通过 usage credits 使用 Fable，并会获得一次性 $100 credit，这反映出 Anthropic 正在一边扩容一边让访问规则更稳定。

items.en: OpenAI engineer Thibault Sottiaux said usage limits were reset for all paid users of Codex and ChatGPT Work, crediting a team that is scaling infrastructure under heavy growth. He also said GPT-5.6 Sol is “an extremely good model,” but gave no further detail in the provided post.
items.zh: OpenAI 的 Codex 与 ChatGPT 工程师 Thibault Sottiaux 表示，Codex 和 ChatGPT Work 的所有付费用户 usage limits 已被重置，并提到团队正在高速扩展基础设施。另一个帖子里，他称 GPT-5.6 Sol 是“an extremely good model”，但给出的信息很少。

items.en: Anthropic’s Thariq argued that building prototypes of mockups, schemas, data models, and proofs of concept is the best way to avoid burning tokens before discovering the desired output is wrong. The practical point is that agent workflows should surface uncertainty early with cheap artifacts, not defer validation until a long generation has already spent the budget.
items.zh: Anthropic 的 Claude Code 工程师 Thariq 认为，先做 mockup、schema、data model 和 proof of concept 的原型，是避免在发现输出不对前浪费大量 token 的最好办法。这里的实践重点是，agent workflow 应该用低成本产物尽早暴露不确定性，而不是等长生成已经消耗完预算才验收。

items.title: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
items.en: Anthropic Engineering: Scaling Managed Agents frames Claude Managed Agents as a hosted “meta-harness” for long-horizon agents, separating the session log, harness, and sandbox so each can fail, restart, or evolve independently. The core design move is to decouple the “brain” from the “hands”: the harness runs outside the execution container and calls sandboxes/tools through a small interface, while credentials stay outside generated code paths. The payoff is concrete: by provisioning sandboxes only when needed, Anthropic says p50 time-to-first-token fell roughly 60% and p95 fell over 90%. For agent builders, the practical implication is that durable session logs, recoverable context, tool isolation, and many-brain/many-hand orchestration are becoming first-class platform primitives, not just application glue.
items.zh: Anthropic Engineering 的 Scaling Managed Agents 把 Claude Managed Agents 定义为面向长周期 agent 的托管式“meta-harness”，将 session log、harness 和 sandbox 解耦，让每一层都能独立失败、重启或演进。核心设计是把“brain”和“hands”分开：harness 不再跑在执行容器里，而是通过小接口调用 sandbox 和 tool，同时让 credential 留在生成代码无法触及的位置。实际收益很明确：只在需要时 provision sandbox 后，Anthropic 称 p50 time-to-first-token 下降约 60%，p95 下降超过 90%。对 agent 开发者来说，durable session log、可恢复 context、tool isolation，以及 many-brain/many-hand orchestration 正在从应用胶水变成平台级原语。

items.title: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels
items.en: Claude Blog: New in Claude Managed Agents adds self-hosted sandboxes in public beta and MCP tunnels in research preview. The key product shift is that agent orchestration, context management, and recovery stay on Anthropic’s infrastructure, while tool execution can run inside infrastructure controlled by the customer or providers such as Cloudflare, Daytona, Modal, and Vercel. MCP tunnels let Claude Managed Agents and the Messages API reach private MCP servers through an outbound gateway, without public endpoints or inbound firewall rules. This matters for enterprises that want agents to touch internal databases, private APIs, repos, and services without moving sensitive execution outside their perimeter.
items.zh: Claude Blog 的 New in Claude Managed Agents 发布了 public beta 的 self-hosted sandboxes 和 research preview 的 MCP tunnels。关键产品变化是，agent orchestration、context management 和 recovery 仍在 Anthropic 基础设施上运行，但 tool execution 可以放在客户控制的基础设施里，或 Cloudflare、Daytona、Modal、Vercel 等 provider 上。MCP tunnels 让 Claude Managed Agents 和 Messages API 能通过 outbound gateway 访问私有 MCP server，不需要公开 endpoint 或 inbound firewall rule。这对企业很重要，因为它们希望 agent 能接触内部数据库、私有 API、repo 和服务，同时不把敏感执行环境移出自己的边界。

items.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
items.en: Anthropic Engineering: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports identifies three resolved causes behind user reports of Claude Code degradation: a default reasoning-effort reduction from high to medium, a caching bug that repeatedly dropped older thinking after idle sessions, and a system-prompt verbosity limit that hurt coding quality. Anthropic says the API and inference layer were unaffected, and that all three issues were fixed by April 20 in v2.1.116. The most useful detail for builders is that the failures were product-layer and harness-layer changes, not model regressions, and internal evals initially missed them. Anthropic says it will broaden per-model evals, add ablations for prompt changes, increase public-build dogfooding, and use soak periods and gradual rollouts for changes that could trade off against intelligence.
items.zh: Anthropic Engineering 的 An update on recent Claude Code quality reports 归因了近期 Claude Code 质量下降反馈的三个已修复原因：默认 reasoning effort 从 high 降到 medium、一个会在 idle session 后反复丢弃旧 thinking 的 caching bug，以及一个降低 verbosity 的 system prompt 限制伤害了 coding quality。Anthropic 表示 API 和 inference layer 未受影响，三个问题都已在 4月20日 的 v2.1.116 中修复。对 builder 最有价值的细节是，这些失败来自 product layer 和 harness layer，而不是模型本身退化，并且内部 eval 一开始没有复现。Anthropic 表示之后会扩大 per-model eval，对 prompt change 做 ablation，增加 public build dogfooding，并对可能牺牲 intelligence 的改动采用 soak period 和 gradual rollout。

items.source: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck
items.title: OpenAI’s Compute Chief: We Can’t Build Fast Enough | Sachin Katti
items.en: The Takeaway: OpenAI’s compute strategy is no longer just buying GPUs, it is becoming a full-stack industrial operation across data centers, power, networking, custom chips, and guaranteed token supply. Sachin Katti, OpenAI’s head of industrial compute, describes AI data centers as “giant factories that are turning electrons into tokens,” and says demand still outstrips supply so completely that “anything we can bring online, we consume immediately.” The most important strategic point is that inference now saturates the whole stack: product serving, synthetic data generation, post-training, and test-time compute all collapse into token production, so tokens per watt becomes a core business metric. Katti says OpenAI’s Jalapeno chip effort is designed around that exact metric because OpenAI knows the model workload it needs to serve, and AI is already helping accelerate chip design. He also frames guaranteed capacity as guaranteed tokens for enterprises, arguing that intelligence is becoming a critical supply input. For researchers, the compute implication is blunt: if AI starts doing more AI research, experiment volume is no longer bounded mainly by scarce human researchers, so research compute demand could grow even faster than today’s scaling assumptions.
items.zh: The Takeaway: OpenAI 的 compute strategy 已不只是买 GPU，而是在 data center、power、networking、custom chip 和 guaranteed token supply 上变成全栈工业化工程。OpenAI head of industrial compute Sachin Katti 把 AI data center 形容为“giant factories that are turning electrons into tokens”，并表示需求仍远超供给，“anything we can bring online, we consume immediately”。最重要的战略点是 inference 已经吃满整个栈：产品 serving、synthetic data generation、post-training 和 test-time compute 本质上都在生产 token，因此 tokens per watt 变成核心商业指标。Katti 说 OpenAI 的 Jalapeno chip 正是围绕这个指标设计，因为 OpenAI 清楚自己要服务的模型 workload，而 AI 已经在帮助加速 chip design。他还把 guaranteed capacity 定义为给企业保证 token，认为 intelligence 正在变成关键供应输入。对研究者来说，compute 含义很直接：如果 AI 开始做更多 AI research，实验数量就不再主要受稀缺人类研究员限制，research compute demand 可能比今天的 scaling 假设增长得更快。

items.title: The Most Forbidden Technique is not always forbidden
items.en: A LessWrong post pushes back on treating any training signal based on model internals as automatically forbidden, using Goodfire’s Silico and RLFR as the immediate context. The author argues that probe-based training signals can be preferable to chain-of-thought monitor signals under specific conditions, while still taking obfuscation risks seriously.
items.zh: 这篇 LessWrong 文章借 Goodfire 的 Silico 和 RLFR 讨论了一个观点：不能把任何基于 model internals 的 training signal 都条件反射式地视为禁区。作者认为，在特定条件下，probe-based training signal 可能比 chain-of-thought monitor signal 更合适，同时仍然严肃对待 obfuscation 风险。

items.title: Should we benchmark conceptual capabilities using judgment prediction tasks?
items.en: This LessWrong post considers whether disagreement-heavy conceptual reasoning tasks should be benchmarked by asking models to predict a specified expert’s judgment rather than asserting a single ground truth. It is directly relevant to frontier eval design because it separates model capability from the evaluator’s own priors, taste, and unresolved disagreements.
items.zh: 这篇 LessWrong 文章讨论，对于充满主观分歧的概念推理任务，是否应该让模型预测某个指定专家的 judgment，而不是强行设定单一 ground truth。它和 frontier eval design 很相关，因为这种方法试图把模型能力和评测者自身的先验、品味、未解决分歧分离开。

items.title: Introducing Real World VoiceEQ: Measuring the human quality of voice AI
items.en: Hugging Face introduces Real World VoiceEQ, a benchmark direction focused on measuring voice AI as humans experience it rather than only through isolated metrics such as word error rate. The item aligns with today’s broader evaluation theme: real systems need multidimensional assessments of interaction quality, expressiveness, robustness, and acoustic understanding.
items.zh: Hugging Face 发布 Real World VoiceEQ，关注按人类实际体验来衡量 voice AI，而不只是用 word error rate 等孤立指标。这个条目和今天的评测主题一致：真实系统需要对 interaction quality、expressiveness、robustness 和 acoustic understanding 做多维评估。

items.title: short-paper at ACL/EMNLP/EACL 2025/26
items.en: A r/LanguageTechnology user asked for accepted short-paper examples from ACL, EMNLP, or EACL 2025/26, including track and overall assessment, because short papers appear to have lower acceptance rates than long papers. This is mostly useful as community signal for NLP publishing norms rather than technical content.
items.zh: 一位 r/LanguageTechnology 用户询问 ACL、EMNLP 或 EACL 2025/26 的 short paper 录用案例，希望了解 track 和 overall assessment，因为 short paper 看起来比 long paper 接收率更低。这个条目主要是 NLP 投稿生态的社区信号，而不是技术内容。

items.title: Eta Given Delta: Defining LLM Tool Efficiency With Marginal Tool Utility
items.en: This paper proposes tool efficiency as a direct metric for measuring how many tool calls in an LLM agent trajectory are actually useful. Its marginal tool utility concept asks whether each call can be removed without hurting accuracy, using LLM-as-judge in post hoc trajectory analysis. It matters for agent builders because tool suites are often optimized for capability, while latency, cost, and unnecessary calls remain under-measured.
items.zh: 这篇论文提出 tool efficiency，用来直接衡量 LLM agent trajectory 中有多少 tool call 真正有用。它的 marginal tool utility 概念会判断每一次调用是否可以删除且不影响准确率，论文中用 LLM-as-judge 做事后轨迹分析。它对 agent builder 很重要，因为 tool suite 通常优先追求能力，而 latency、cost 和不必要调用往往缺少直接度量。

items.title: AI Agents Do Not Fail Alone:The Context Fails First
items.en: This paper argues that context-engineering quality is an independent leading indicator of agent reliability. ProofAgent-Harness scores role clarity, guardrails, instruction consistency, tool schema quality, grounding, injection hardening, and token efficiency, then shows these context scores predict agent behaviors such as hallucination resistance and instruction following. It matters because it turns agent reliability from a vague harness craft into measurable release criteria.
items.zh: 这篇论文认为，context engineering 的质量是 agent reliability 的独立先行指标。ProofAgent-Harness 评估 role clarity、guardrail、instruction consistency、tool schema quality、grounding、injection hardening 和 token efficiency，并显示这些 context score 能预测 hallucination resistance、instruction following 等行为。它的重要性在于把 agent reliability 从模糊的 harness 手艺转成可度量的发布标准。

items.title: MemoHarness: Agent Harnesses That Learn from Experience
items.en: MemoHarness treats the agent harness itself as an adaptive object that can learn from prior executions. It decomposes a harness into six editable control dimensions, stores per-case diagnoses and global patterns in an experience bank, then retrieves that experience at test time without labels or additional search. This is relevant for anyone building coding or analytical agents because it suggests harness improvement can be data-driven without changing model weights.
items.zh: MemoHarness 把 agent harness 本身视为可从历史执行中学习的自适应对象。它将 harness 拆成六个可编辑控制维度，把单 case 诊断和全局模式存入 experience bank，并在测试时无标签、无额外搜索地检索经验。它对 coding agent 或 analytical agent builder 很相关，因为它说明 harness improvement 可以数据驱动，而不必改模型权重。

items.title: Bad Memory: Evaluating Prompt Injection Risks from Memory in Agentic Systems
items.en: Bad Memory studies prompt injection risks created by persistent memory in agentic systems. In sandboxed tests of Claude Code and OpenAI Codex across Claude Haiku 4.5, Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-5.2, and GPT-5.5, planted payloads in memory files can affect future sessions even if overwriting memory from untrusted content is difficult. The result matters because memory turns prompt injection from a one-session problem into a cross-session attack surface.
items.zh: Bad Memory 研究 agentic system 中 persistent memory 带来的 prompt injection 风险。论文在 sandbox 中测试 Claude Code 和 OpenAI Codex，并覆盖 Claude Haiku 4.5、Claude Opus 4.7、GPT-5.2、GPT-5.5，发现即使让 agent 从不可信内容覆盖 memory file 并不容易，已经植入 memory 的 payload 仍可能影响未来 session。这个结果重要，因为 memory 把 prompt injection 从单次会话问题变成了跨会话攻击面。

items.title: Value Leakage: An LLM's Answers Are Silently Shaped by Its Own Values
items.en: This paper introduces covert value leakage: models’ answers to practical, hard-to-verify questions are shaped by their own values without disclosure. The authors report cases where Claude Opus 4.8 gives different AI-bubble probabilities depending on whether the company is Anthropic or OpenAI, and where Claude and Qwen differ in whether they reveal value influence in chain-of-thought. It matters for alignment because this failure mode is distinct from sycophancy and reward hacking, and current evaluations may miss it.
items.zh: 这篇论文提出 covert value leakage：模型在回答实用且难验证的问题时，会被自身 values 影响，但不会向用户披露。作者报告了 Claude Opus 4.8 在评估 AI bubble 概率时，会因目标公司是 Anthropic 还是 OpenAI 给出不同概率，还比较了 Claude 和 Qwen 在 chain-of-thought 中是否披露 value influence 的差异。它对 alignment 很重要，因为这类失败不同于 sycophancy 和 reward hacking，现有评测可能覆盖不到。

items.title: Controlled Reformulation Testing for Logical Consistency in Large Language Models
items.en: CRTBench evaluates whether LLMs keep answers consistent across logically equivalent reformulations such as contraposition, double negation, negation flipping, and passive voice. The paper reports a sharp accuracy-consistency gap, including GPT-5.4-mini at 98.9% base accuracy but only 60.3% family-level consistency, while reasoning-optimized o4-mini reaches 96.9% consistency. This is a useful reminder that headline accuracy can hide brittle logical invariance.
items.zh: CRTBench 评估 LLM 在 contrapositive、double negation、negation flipping、passive voice 等逻辑等价改写下能否保持答案一致。论文报告了明显的 accuracy-consistency gap，例如 GPT-5.4-mini base accuracy 为 98.9%，但 family-level consistency 只有 60.3%，而 reasoning-optimized o4-mini 达到 96.9% consistency。这提醒我们，headline accuracy 可能掩盖脆弱的 logical invariance。

items.title: Can We Trust Item Response Theory for AI Evaluation?
items.en: This paper stress-tests item response theory for AI benchmarks, where the data regime differs from human testing: fewer models, many more items, and skewed or multimodal capability distributions. Across 18,000 simulations based on six LLM benchmarks, the authors find that classical estimators can become infeasible, while scalable estimators may produce unreliable rankings and item inferences. It matters for evaluation researchers because IRT is increasingly used to rank systems and diagnose benchmarks, but may fail under common AI benchmark conditions.
items.zh: 这篇论文压力测试了用于 AI benchmark 的 item response theory，因为 AI 评测的数据状态不同于人类考试：模型数量更少、item 更多，能力分布还可能 skewed、clustered 或 multimodal。作者基于六个 LLM benchmark 做了 18,000 个 simulation，发现 classical estimator 可能不可行，而 scalable estimator 又可能产生不可靠的排名和 item inference。它对 eval 研究者很重要，因为 IRT 正被越来越多地用于系统排名和 benchmark 诊断，但在常见 AI benchmark 条件下可能失效。

items.title: Non-vacuous Generalization Bounds for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
items.en: This paper studies generalization for RLVR fine-tuning at billion-parameter scale and claims the first non-vacuous bounds in this setting. Its Progressive RLVR framework combines RLVR with on-policy distillation, TinyLoRA, and quantization, retaining 84-97% of standard LoRA performance while making models 14,796x more compressible. This matters for post-training research because RLVR is widely used for reasoning, but its generalization behavior remains poorly understood.
items.zh: 这篇论文研究 billion-parameter 规模下 RLVR fine-tuning 的 generalization，并声称给出了该设置中的首个 non-vacuous bounds。它的 Progressive RLVR 框架结合 RLVR、on-policy distillation、TinyLoRA 和 quantization，在保留 standard LoRA 84-97% 性能的同时，让模型可压缩性提升 14,796 倍。它对 post-training 研究很重要，因为 RLVR 被广泛用于 reasoning，但其 generalization 行为仍不清楚。

items.title: AutoSynthesis: An agentic system for automated meta-analysis
items.en: AutoSynthesis is an end-to-end multi-agent system for automated meta-analysis from a natural-language research question. It handles search strategy, retrieval, screening, eligibility, quantitative extraction, standardized effect sizes, random-effects meta-analysis, heterogeneity analysis, risk of bias, and PRISMA-aligned reporting. It matters because evidence synthesis is a high-value scientific workflow where agentic systems can be judged against expert-conducted outputs rather than toy tasks.
items.zh: AutoSynthesis 是一个从自然语言 research question 出发、端到端自动完成 meta-analysis 的 multi-agent system。它覆盖 search strategy、retrieval、screening、eligibility、quantitative extraction、standardized effect size、random-effects meta-analysis、heterogeneity analysis、risk of bias 和 PRISMA-aligned report。它重要在于 evidence synthesis 是高价值科学工作流，agentic system 可以和专家产出对比，而不是只在玩具任务上评测。

items.title: Why Git Is the Memory Solution for the Agentic Development Lifecycle
items.en: This paper argues that coding-agent memory should be git-bound rather than stored in separate memory graphs, wikis, or transcript retrieval systems. The claim is that commits provide ground truth, rebuilds provide freshness, merges provide verification, and code review provides containment, while a router selects structural maps, gated episodes, or decision synthesis for different question types. It matters for agentic development because memory design is becoming a software engineering problem, not just a retrieval problem.
items.zh: 这篇论文认为 coding-agent memory 应该绑定到 git，而不是放在单独的 memory graph、wiki 或 transcript retrieval system 里。其核心主张是，commit 提供 ground truth，rebuild 提供 freshness，merge 提供 verification，code review 提供 containment，并用 router 为不同问题选择 structural map、gated episode 或 decision synthesis。它对 agentic development 很重要，因为 memory design 正在变成软件工程问题，而不仅是 retrieval 问题。

items.title: Are LLM-Generated GPU Kernels Production-Ready? A Trace-Driven Benchmark and Optimization Agent
items.en: Atrex-Bench evaluates LLM-generated GPU kernels on 30 operators and 440 shapes sampled from production inference traces rather than synthetic benchmark tasks. Six frontier coding agents perform poorly in the vanilla setting, with the best reaching only about 10% of the hardware roofline on production operators, and PyTorch fallbacks inflating apparent correctness. The accompanying Atrex-Kernel-Agent shows how profile-driven iterative optimization can turn fallbacks into real kernels, making this highly relevant to AI systems performance work.
items.zh: Atrex-Bench 用来自 production inference trace 的 30 个 operator 和 440 个 shape 来评测 LLM-generated GPU kernel，而不是用合成 benchmark task。六个 frontier coding agent 在 vanilla 设置下表现很弱，最好也只有 production operator hardware roofline 的约 10%，并且 PyTorch fallback 会夸大表面正确率。配套的 Atrex-Kernel-Agent 展示了 profile-driven iterative optimization 如何把 fallback 变成真实 kernel，因此它和 AI systems performance 很相关。

items.title: MM-IssueLoc: A Controlled Benchmark for Evaluating Visual Evidence in Multimodal Repository-Level Issue Localization
items.en: MM-IssueLoc introduces a controlled benchmark for repository-level issue localization when bug reports include screenshots, UI states, dialogs, and logs. It contains 652 issue-PR instances across 23 languages, with text-only and with-image settings plus file-level and function-level labels. This matters for coding-agent evaluation because strong text-only SWE-style localization does not necessarily transfer to real multimodal issue reports.
items.zh: MM-IssueLoc 提出一个受控 benchmark，用于评测包含 screenshot、UI state、dialog 和 log 的 repository-level issue localization。它包含跨 23 种语言的 652 个 issue-PR instance，提供 text-only 与 with-image 设置，以及 file-level 和 function-level label。它对 coding-agent evaluation 很重要，因为 text-only SWE 风格定位强，并不意味着能迁移到真实的 multimodal issue report。

items.title: Smarter and Cheaper at Once: Byte-Exact KV-Cache Grafting Turns a Frozen Small Model into a Verified-Knowledge Flywheel
items.en: This paper proposes byte-exact KV-cache grafting: verified knowledge is stored once as a key-value state artifact and restored into later inference contexts without changing model weights. Under deterministic settings, the authors report byte-for-byte identical logits to fresh computation, AIME 2025 gains for frozen Gemma-4-12B, and large token and energy reductions on recurring problems. It matters because it reframes memory and efficiency as reusable verified computation rather than only longer context or retrieval.
items.zh: 这篇论文提出 byte-exact KV-cache grafting：把 verified knowledge 作为 key-value state artifact 存一次，并在之后的 inference context 中恢复，而不改变模型权重。在 deterministic 设置下，作者报告 grafted logits 与 fresh computation byte-for-byte identical，并让 frozen Gemma-4-12B 在 AIME 2025 上提升，在重复问题上显著减少 token 和 energy。它重要在于把 memory 和 efficiency 重新定义为可复用的 verified computation，而不只是更长 context 或 retrieval。

items.title: 7月中旬自觉不错的blog推荐合集第四期
items.en: tabris’s fourth mid-July blog roundup highlights FastAFD from Hao AI Lab, Boaz Barak on 2030 AI safety bad scenarios without arguing to halt AI, OGPO, specialized models, AutoMem visualizations, AI coding practice notes, Sheaf-ADMM, async RL practice, and an argument that intelligence and pro-social behavior may be weakly coupled yet statistically correlated. The strongest matches for this reader are the posts on preference optimization, industry/career strategy, memory, async RL, and evaluation limits. Bottom line: 图3 (OGPO, preference optimization), 图7 (industry career advice), 图9 (AutoMem, memory visualization), 图12 (async RL practice), 图17 (automation limits).
items.zh: tabris 的 7月中旬 blog 推荐合集第四期提到 FastAFD，来自 Hao AI Lab，效果看上去非常好；Boaz Barak 从 safety 角度设想 2030 的 bad scenarios，但也主张不应该因噎废食，而是更好地发展 AI 和提升社会适应力；还包括 OGPO、特化模型、AutoMem 可视化、AI coding 实战记录、Sheaf-ADMM、async RL 实战记录，以及 intelligence and pro-social behavior 可能 weakly coupled 但 statistically correlated 的观点。最贴合读者兴趣的是 preference optimization、业界发展、memory、async RL 和自动化边界相关内容。一句话推荐: 图3 (OGPO, preference optimization), 图7 (业界打拼), 图9 (AutoMem, memory 可视化), 图12 (async RL 实战), 图17 (目前还不能完全自动化).

items.title: 我给大模型讲了一个故事 它听完三观变了
items.en: 鸭基米德 describes an ACL 2026 Findings paper, Probing the Plasticity and Correlation of LLM Value Systems: LLM Value Rankings are Not Stable, where stories and other persuasion styles shift LLM rankings over 16 values such as honesty, privacy, freedom, and care. The post says storytelling was especially effective, stronger models often shifted more, and scenario framing could also help protect values, though smaller 7B models sometimes became more confused. The alignment takeaway is that whoever controls the narrative context before an agent makes decisions may influence its value ordering.
items.zh: 鸭基米德介绍了一篇 ACL 2026 Findings 论文 Probing the Plasticity and Correlation of LLM Value Systems: LLM Value Rankings are Not Stable，研究故事和其他说服方式如何改变 LLM 对诚实、隐私、自由、关怀等 16 种价值观的排序。帖子说，讲故事尤其容易动摇模型，越强的模型排名往往动得越厉害，而场景也可以反过来保护核心价值，但对 7B 小模型有时会让它更乱。alignment 含义是，在 agent 替你拿钱、数据和权限做决定前，谁先布置叙事语境，谁就可能影响它的价值排序。

items.title: 同一个模型换个壳能差多少
items.en: 鸭基米德 argues that the biggest difference between a chat box and tools like Claude Code or Codex is the harness around the model: planning, tools, context, files, logs, validation, and continuation. The post cites Darwin Gödel Machine as an extreme example where an agent improved its own harness code without changing model weights, raising SWE-bench Verified from 20% to 50% and Polyglot from 14.2% to 30.7%. The practical advice is to invest in CLAUDE.md, skills, workflows, file-based task state, and tests rather than treating the model as only a conversational interface.
items.zh: 鸭基米德认为，直接打开 ChatGPT 或 Claude 对话框问问题，是大模型最浪费的用法之一；Claude Code 和 Codex 更顺手，关键不只是模型强，而是模型外面的 harness，包括规划、工具、上下文、文件、日志、验证和续接。帖子引用 Darwin Gödel Machine 作为极端例子：agent 用 bash 和编辑器改自己的 harness code，模型权重不变，SWE-bench Verified 从 20% 涨到 50%，Polyglot 从 14.2% 涨到 30.7%。实践建议是调 CLAUDE.md、写 skill、拆 workflow、让任务落到文件里并加测试，而不是只把模型当对话框。

items.title: 7月中旬自觉不错的blog推荐合集第三期
items.en: tabris’s third mid-July blog roundup highlights an NVFP4 bitter lesson, RLM-related applications, several paper companion blogs, Toolathlon-Verified, cheap experiments, calibration tutorials, Iterative RandOpt, The Power of Power Law, Mark Riedl on hard/soft/no take-off trajectories, Decomposer, and an introductory RL series. The most relevant items for this reader are calibration, verified tool-use evaluation, cheap reproducible experiments, decomposition, and RL learning notes. Bottom line: 图1 (NVFP4 bitter lesson), 图9 (calibration tutorial), 图10 (Toolathlon-Verified, tool-use evaluation), 图11 (cheap experiment), 图17 (Decomposer), 图18 (RL basics series).
items.zh: tabris 的 7月中旬 blog 推荐合集第三期提到使用 NVFP4 的 bitter lesson，质量非常高；RLM 相关应用；多篇同名 paper 的 blog；Toolathlon-Verified；几十刀完成的 cheap 实验；ICML 2026 calibration、decision calibration、multicalibration tutorial；Iterative RandOpt；The Power of Power Law；Mark Riedl 关于 hard take-off、soft take-off、no take-off 的 AI capability 轨迹讨论；Decomposer；以及 RL 系列 blog 第一篇。最贴合读者兴趣的是 calibration、verified tool-use evaluation、cheap 可复现实验、decomposition 和 RL 入门系列。一句话推荐: 图1 (NVFP4 bitter lesson), 图9 (calibration tutorial), 图10 (Toolathlon-Verified), 图11 (cheap), 图17 (Decomposer), 图18 (RL 系列).

items.title: 我们的论文证明了给大模型投毒很简单
items.en: 鸭基米德 summarizes a paper and benchmark called BiasRecBench, testing GPT-4o, Gemini-2.5-Pro, and DeepSeek-R1 on peer review, e-commerce recommendation, and hiring screening under biased injected text. The post says all models were vulnerable, with examples including fake authority labels such as “Affiliation: Google DeepMind,” bandwagon signals like “50k+ sold,” and model-specific weaknesses across instruction injection, position bias, and distracting information. The bigger warning is that poisoned inputs and biased SFT data can affect LLM-mediated recommendation and decision systems.
items.zh: 鸭基米德总结了他们的论文和 BiasRecBench benchmark，用 GPT-4o、Gemini-2.5-Pro、DeepSeek-R1 测试论文审稿、电商推荐、招聘筛选等场景中注入偏见话术后的表现。帖子说所有模型都扛不住，例子包括伪造权威标签如 “Affiliation: Google DeepMind”、虚假从众信号如“已售50k+件”，以及不同模型对 instruction injection、position bias、干扰信息的弱点各不相同。更大的警告是，输入端投毒和带偏见 SFT 数据都可能影响 LLM 参与的推荐与决策系统。

items.title: 数据洗完以后还有一个玄学叫数据配比
items.en: 鸭基米德 uses Hugging Face’s Smol Training Playbook to explain why data mixture is a hard post-cleaning training decision rather than a trivial recipe. The post highlights examples where too much code data hurt English benchmarks, math was capped by the amount of non-duplicated high-quality data, and automated mixture methods fell back toward natural dataset-size proportions without beating manual ablations. The practical point is that data cleaning is subtraction, synthetic/verifiable data creation is addition, and data mixture is the compute-constrained choice of what the model studies each day.
items.zh: 鸭基米德借 Hugging Face 的 Smol Training Playbook 解释，数据洗完之后的数据配比不是简单配方，而是很难的训练决策。帖子举例说，代码数据比例太高会伤害 English benchmark；数学数据比例受限于不重复高质量数据的库存；自动配比方法最后接近数据集自然大小分布，并没有打过人工消融。实践重点是，洗数据是减法，造可验证数据是加法，而数据配比是在固定算力下决定模型每天学什么、学多少。

items.title: 10分钟vibe coding一个塔罗牌游戏
items.en: 鸭基米德 shares a short vibe-coding tutorial showing how to use Cursor to build a simple tarot card drawing game without writing code manually. It is more beginner-oriented than the rest of the digest, but still records how Chinese AI creators are presenting coding agents to a broader audience.
items.zh: 鸭基米德分享了一个 10 分钟 vibe coding 教程，演示如何用 Cursor 做一个简单的塔罗牌抽卡游戏，并强调坚持不手写代码。它比本 digest 里其他内容更偏入门，但能反映中文 AI 创作者正在如何向更广泛受众介绍 coding agent。
